tagline_jsonb.en: Agentic browser video editor for AI-powered rough cuts and team collaboration
tagline_jsonb.zh: 面向 AI 粗剪与团队协作的浏览器端 Agentic 视频编辑器

description_jsonb.en: > Cardboard is an agentic browser video editor for creators, marketers, and video teams that need faster first cuts from raw footage. Its core value is turning natural-language requests into real editing actions, then fitting that AI rough-cut workflow into professional post-production systems and collaborative content operations. Cardboard is built for AI-first post-production rather than old-school manual timeline grinding. It combines natural-language commands, automated captions, browser-based collaboration, and export paths into Adobe Premiere Pro and DaVinci Resolve, making it a practical layer for repeatable launch videos, podcast clipping, and short-form repurposing systems. The official pricing page gives the clearest hard numbers. Creator starts at $60/mo billed annually, includes 5 active projects per month, 2.5GB max file size, 100GB cloud storage, automated captions, and unlimited exports up to 4K 60fps. Pro starts at $150/mo, raises file size to 10GB, storage to 1TB, and unlocks unlimited projects plus priority AI processing. Cardboard offers a Paid Only plan, with paid tiers starting at $60/mo. It is more expensive than average for this category. That premium can still make sense if your team produces videos continuously and wants to automate repetitive edit requests instead of paying with editor hours. From a systems angle, Cardboard is strongest as the AI first-pass layer, not the final mastering environment. The workflow value is straightforward: use AI to cut, caption, and organize footage in the browser, then hand off to Premiere Pro or DaVinci Resolve only when advanced finishing is necessary.
description_jsonb.zh: > Cardboard 是一款运行在浏览器中的 Agentic 视频编辑器，适合需要把原始素材更快变成初版成片的创作者、营销团队和视频团队。它的核心价值是把自然语言需求直接转成真实剪辑动作，再把 AI 粗剪流程接入专业后期软件和协作型内容生产系统。 Cardboard 更像面向 AI-first 后期的工作台，而不是传统手工拖时间线的软件。它把自然语言命令、自动字幕、浏览器协作，以及导出到 Adobe Premiere Pro 和 DaVinci Resolve 组合在一起，因此很适合产品发布视频、播客切条和短视频矩阵这种可复制内容流水线。 官网定价页给出了最关键的硬指标。Creator 套餐起价为 $60/mo 按年付费，包含每月 5 个活跃项目、2.5GB 单文件上限、100GB 云存储、自动字幕，以及最高 4K 60fps 无限导出。Pro 套餐起价为 $150/mo，把单文件上限提升到 10GB、存储提升到 1TB，并解锁无限项目和优先 AI 处理。 Cardboard offers a Paid Only plan, with paid tiers starting at $60/mo. It is more expensive than average for this category. 但如果你的团队长期稳定产出视频，想用自动化替代重复剪辑工时，这个价格仍然有现实意义。 从系统架构角度看，Cardboard 最适合承担 AI 首轮粗剪层，而不是最终精修母版环境。更合理的落地方式是先在浏览器里完成 AI 剪辑、字幕和素材整理，再把复杂调色或高级精修交给 Premiere Pro 或 DaVinci Resolve。

en: Describe edits and automate rough-cut actions
Generate captions and speed social delivery
Trim repetitive footage and reduce manual cleanup
Export projects and preserve pro finishing workflows
Collaborate in browser and accelerate review cycles
Scale recurring content ops with shared project controls
zh: 描述修改需求并自动执行粗剪动作
生成字幕并加快社媒发布节奏
裁掉重复片段并减少手工清理
导出项目并保留专业精修流程
在浏览器内协作并压缩审片周期
用共享项目机制扩展持续内容产能

videos_jsonb.title: Welcome to Cardboard | BETA Walkthrough
videos_jsonb.description: Official beta walkthrough showing Cardboard UI and editing flow

en.summary: Cardboard is the efficient choice for **content teams** who need to **turn raw footage into publish-ready drafts with less manual editing**. It stands out when speed, collaboration, and repeatability matter more than frame-perfect finishing. The price is premium, but the workflow compression is credible.
en.expert_quote: LinkStart AI Lab view: Cardboard is strongest when used as an AI rough-cut system, not a full studio replacement.
pros: Strong for automated podcast clipping workflow
Exports cleanly into Premiere Pro workflows
cons: Starts at $60/mo with no free tier
Privacy terms may concern sensitive teams

zh.summary: Cardboard 是 **内容生产团队** 用来 **把原始素材更快转成可发布初稿并减少手工剪辑** 的高效选择。它最适合强调速度、协作和规模化复用的内容场景，而不是逐帧精修。价格偏高，但流程压缩价值是成立的。
zh.expert_quote: LinkStart AI Lab 判断：Cardboard 最强的定位是 AI 粗剪系统，而不是完整替代专业后期工作站。
pros: 很适合自动化播客切条流程
浏览器协作明显降低沟通成本
能顺畅衔接 Premiere Pro 精修
cons: Creator 每月仅 5 个活跃项目
隐私条款对敏感素材不够友好

question.en: Cardboard vs Descript: which is better for podcast clipping?
question.zh: Cardboard 和 Descript 相比，谁更适合播客切条？

answer.en: The core difference is workflow. While Descript excels at transcript-first edits, Cardboard has the stronger edge in browser-based rough cuts, natural-language edit actions, and handoff to Premiere Pro or DaVinci Resolve.
answer.zh: 核心差异在工作流。虽然 Descript 更擅长按转录稿编辑，但 Cardboard 在浏览器粗剪、自然语言改片和衔接 Premiere Pro 或 DaVinci Resolve 上更强。

question.en: What is the biggest real-world drawback users will feel first?
question.zh: 用户最先感受到的现实短板是什么？

answer.en: The main drawback is pricing pressure. At $60/mo with only 5 active projects on Creator, Cardboard is better for monetized content pipelines than casual side projects.
answer.zh: 最大短板是价格压力。Creator 套餐 $60/mo 且每月只有 5 个活跃项目，所以它更适合商业化内容流水线，不适合轻量副业尝试。

question.en: Does Cardboard have a free tier and what are the hard limits?
question.zh: Cardboard 有免费版吗，硬限制有哪些？

answer.en: No. Cardboard has no public free tier. Creator starts at $60/mo with 5 active projects, 2.5GB files, 100GB storage, and exports up to 4K 60fps.
answer.zh: 没有。Cardboard 目前没有公开免费版。Creator 从 $60/mo 起，包含 5 个活跃项目、2.5GB 文件上限、100GB 存储和最高 4K 60fps 导出。

question.en: How does Cardboard fit into a modern AI video stack?
question.zh: Cardboard 如何接入现代 AI 视频工作流？

answer.en: Yes, best as the first-pass layer. Use Cardboard for rough cuts, captions, and browser review, then move advanced finishing into Adobe Premiere Pro or DaVinci Resolve.
answer.zh: 可以，最适合放在首轮粗剪层。先用 Cardboard 做粗剪、字幕和浏览器审片，再把高级精修交给 Adobe Premiere Pro 或 DaVinci Resolve。

question.en: Will Cardboard use my footage for model training?
question.zh: Cardboard 会用我的素材训练模型吗？

answer.en: Potentially yes. Its privacy policy says it may analyze user content and use data to train, test, and improve machine learning models and algorithms. Sensitive teams should request written clarification before uploading confidential footage.
answer.zh: 有这个可能。它的隐私政策写明，可能分析用户内容，并将数据用于训练、测试和改进机器学习模型与算法。敏感团队在上传保密素材前应先要书面确认。

question.en: Can Cardboard work for launch videos and short-form content systems?
question.zh: Cardboard 能用于产品发布视频和短视频内容系统吗？

answer.en: Yes. It is well suited for launch videos, explainers, talking-head edits, and short-form repurposing. While CapCut is faster for template-heavy social output, Cardboard is stronger for reusable team workflows.
answer.zh: 可以。它很适合产品发布视频、讲解视频、口播和短视频拆分。虽然 CapCut 在模板化社媒快产上更快，但 Cardboard 在团队可复用工作流上更强。

en.reason: We chose **Descript** and **CapCut** because they represent the two most common replacement paths for **Cardboard** buyers: transcript-led editing and social-first speed. The table focuses on **workflow pain**, **automation depth**, **limits**, **ecosystem fit**, **learning curve**, and **ROI**.
en.caption: Cardboard vs Descript vs CapCut
rows: **Fast rough cuts** from raw footage with AI edit commands
**5 active projects** and **2.5GB** files on Creator
**Great for dialogue edits** but less visual-semantic
**Easy output** but less studio-grade workflow control
**Exports to Premiere Pro and DaVinci Resolve**
**Strong social publishing** but weaker pro handoff
**Best ROI** for recurring team video production
en.tldr: Buy **Cardboard** for repeatable AI-first production, choose **Descript** for transcript-heavy editing, and pick **CapCut** for faster low-complexity social publishing.

zh.reason: 这里选择 **Descript** 和 **CapCut**，因为它们对应 **Cardboard** 最真实的替代路径：一种是转录稿驱动编辑，一种是社媒短视频快产。维度围绕 **核心痛点**、**自动化能力**、**限制**、**生态衔接**、**上手门槛** 和 **ROI** 展开。
zh.caption: Cardboard 与核心竞品对比
rows: **AI 粗剪快**，适合原始素材首轮处理
**转录稿编辑强**，适合播客和采访
**社媒出片快**，适合模板化短视频
**文本式编辑** 和语音工作流
**模板化提速** 适合创作者分发
Creator 仅 **5 个活跃项目**，文件上限 **2.5GB**
**口播修订强**，但视觉语义自动化较弱
**上手轻**，但专业工作流控制较弱
**可导出到 Premiere Pro 和 DaVinci Resolve**
**适合创作者** 的转录稿工作流
**社媒闭环强**，但专业交付偏弱
对提示词团队来说 **容易上手**
对按脚本工作的编辑者 **很直观**
对普通创作者来说 **最简单**
**最适合** 持续团队视频生产
**最适合** 对话内容反复改稿
zh.tldr: 如果你要 **可复制的 AI 视频生产系统**，选 **Cardboard**。如果你高度依赖转录稿编辑，选 **Descript**。如果你最在意社媒速度和轻量易用，选 **CapCut**。

seo_title_jsonb.en: Cardboard Review 2026: Pricing, Pros & Cons, Alternatives
seo_title_jsonb.zh: Cardboard 怎么样？2026 最新评测：价格、优缺点与竞品对比

seo_description_jsonb.en: Need faster editing? This Cardboard Review covers Pricing, Free Tier status, hard limits, and AI workflow value so you can judge its fit fast.
seo_description_jsonb.zh: 想更快完成视频剪辑？这篇 Cardboard Review 拆解 Pricing、Free Tier 状态、硬限制与 AI 工作流价值，帮你快速判断是否适合。
